arts.ttl: Millwall decry ‘character assassination’ of Roberts after challenge on Mateta
arts.sum: Goalkeeper sent off for head-high tackle on forward FA may seek to have three-match ban extended Millwall have condemned the “character assassination” of Liam Roberts, as they await a possible extended ban for the goalkeeper’s challenge on Crystal Palace’s Jean-Philippe Mateta. The Championship club have pushed back against what they call “disgraceful suggestions” made against their keeper, following the high challenge that left Mateta with a head injury and led to Roberts being sent off five minutes into their FA Cup fifth-round tie on Saturday lunchtime. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Millwall condemn Roberts abuse after Mateta incident
arts.sum: Millwall have condemned "disgusting" abuse aimed at goalkeeper Liam Roberts after his red card for a head high tackle on Crystal Palace's Jean-Philippe Mateta.

arts.ttl: Millwall man set to miss Bristol City clash after 'reckless' FA Cup red card vs Crystal Palace
arts.sum: Various pundits and supporters have been quick to slam Roberts for his challenge, but Crystal Palace chairman Steve Parish was quick to offer his verdict as he conducted an interview with the BBC at half-time where he suggested the Lions 'keeper had endangered Mateta. Millwall goalkeeper Liam Roberts is set to miss Bristol City's visit to The Den after being sent off in the Lions' defeat to Crystal Palace for a challange on Jean-Philippe Mateta that went viral across the football world.

arts.ttl: Millwall face battle to keep Ra'ees Bangura-Williams as Premier League transfer interest mounts
arts.sum: After Romain Esse joined Crystal Palace, top-flight clubs are now queuing up to sign another talented youngster from The Den

arts.ttl: FA consider extended ban for Millwall 'keeper after Jean-Philippe Mateta horror tackle
arts.sum: Crystal Palace forward Jean-Phillippe was hospitalised and left needing 25 stitches after being kicked in the head by Millwall keeper Liam Roberts in the FA Cup. Roberts was sent off but some have called for an extended ban

arts.ttl: Millwall issue response citing ‘unwarranted character assassination’ of Liam Roberts
arts.sum: “The club are disgusted by abuse directed towards goalkeeper Liam Roberts following Saturday’s unfortunate collision with Jean-Philippe Mateta,” said a Millwall spokesperson. Millwall have issued a statement defending Liam Roberts after his red card in Saturday’s FA Cup loss at Crystal Palace and say they are “disgusted” at the abuse he has received.

arts.ttl: Pompey boss disappointed as Bristol City loanee ruled out for weeks
arts.sum: Having not featured for the Robins for almost two years following an ACL injury and subsequent hamstring issues, City opted to allow the centre-back to spend the second half of the season at Fratton Park to build his match fitness and help him rediscover confidence in his body. John Mousinho has confirmed Portsmouth have suffered a "huge" injury blow with Bristol City loanee Rob Atkinson and Hayden Matthews both set for extended spells on the sidelines.

arts.ttl: Bristol City should be 'looking forward' to Millwall trip, says Chris Hogg
arts.sum: Chris Hogg has insisted Bristol City will have to earn the right to beat Millwall by winning "the fight" and "the scrap" before demonstrating their qualities in possession when they travel to The Den on Tuesday evening. Bristol City Live is now on WhatsApp and we want you to join our community.

arts.ttl: Zak Vyner on play-off aspirations and 'weird' Millwall prep nine years after Bristol City debut
arts.sum: "It makes me feel very old, especially now that I'm in the top five or six oldest players in this team," Vyner told Bristol Live on Friday afternoon. I like to think that I'd be a good person for them to come and talk to, give them some advice and the main thing is making sure they're staying on it out there.

arts.ttl: FA considering longer ban for Millwall's Roberts after Mateta injury
arts.sum: The FA is expected to consider whether to submit a "clearly insufficient" punishment claim that could result in a longer ban for Millwall’s Liam Roberts following his red-card challenge on Jean-Phillipe Mateta.
